handoff.reason: E2E validation: repopulate + reindex + discovery query on feature/source-headers-dogfood. Report semantic_context hits.

execution_rules.phase_1: Single phase, no hard stop. Checkout branch, repopulate, reindex, query, report, return to main.

findings.root_cause: @semantic blocks stamped by --source-headers use the @semantic tag. The semantic-header-parser (src/pipeline/semantic-header-parser.ts L43) detects @coderef-semantic: X.Y.Z format only. @semantic blocks are NOT recognized — headerStatus remains 'missing' on all file-grain nodes after repopulate.
findings.rag_query_result: FAILED — OpenAI API key not configured (embedding_api_error). Vector store empty (0 records). CODEREF_LLOYD_DISCOVERY_RAG=1 query fails — semantic_context NOT populated.
findings.gap_identified: Format mismatch: --source-headers stamps @semantic (exports/used_by only), semantic-header-parser expects @coderef-semantic: with full grammar (version, layer, owners, exports, imports). The two formats are incompatible.

communication_log.note: WO-SOURCE-HEADERS-E2E-VALIDATION-001 created. Plan type: light. E2E smoke test of @semantic pipeline on feature/source-headers-dogfood.

Phase 1 complete. populate-coderef exit:0. rag-index exit:1 (0 chunks indexed, 2705 skipped, 99 failed). Root cause: @semantic format mismatch — parser expects @coderef-semantic: not @semantic. Vector store empty. Discovery query fails (no OpenAI key). E2E pipeline NOT working. Gap reported.
